rewind.confirmMessage: Rewind to this point? File changes after this message will be reverted. Rewinding does not affect files edited manually or via bash.
rewind.noticeSaveFailed: Rewound: {count} file(s) reverted, but failed to save state: {error}

fork.unavailableNoResponse: Cannot fork: no response to fork from
fork.commandNoMessages: Cannot fork: no messages in conversation
fork.commandNoAssistantUuid: Cannot fork: no assistant response with identifiers

userName.name: What should Codexidian call you?
userName.desc: Your name for personalized greetings (leave empty for generic greetings)

excludedTags.name: Excluded tags
excludedTags.desc: Notes with these tags will not auto-load as context (one per line, without #)

mediaFolder.name: Media folder
mediaFolder.desc: Folder containing attachments/images. When notes use ![[image.jpg]], Codex will look here. Leave empty for vault root.

systemPrompt.name: Custom system prompt
systemPrompt.desc: Additional instructions appended to the default system prompt

autoTitle.name: Auto-generate conversation titles
autoTitle.desc: Automatically generate conversation titles after the first user message is sent.

titleModel.name: Title generation model
titleModel.desc: Model used for auto-generating conversation titles.

navMappings.name: Vim-style navigation mappings
navMappings.desc: One mapping per line. Format: "map <key> <action>" (actions: scrollUp, scrollDown, focusInput).

slashCommands.name: Commands and Skills
slashCommands.desc: Manage vault-level Codex skills stored in .codex/skills/ and .agents/skills/. Triggered by $name.

hiddenSlashCommands.name: Hidden Commands and Skills
hiddenSlashCommands.desc: Hide specific commands and skills from the dropdown. Enter names without the leading slash or dollar sign, one per line.

mcpServers.name: MCP Servers
mcpServers.desc: Codex MCP servers are configured by the Codex CLI. Use codex mcp to manage them.

plugins.name: Codex Plugins
plugins.desc: Codexidian is Codex-only and does not manage third-party provider plugins.

subagents.name: Subagents
subagents.desc: Manage vault-level Codex subagents stored in .codex/agents/. Each TOML file defines one custom agent.
subagents.noAgents: No subagents configured. Click + to create one.
subagents.renameCleanupFailed: Warning: could not remove old file for "{name}"

modal.name: Name
modal.nameDesc: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only
modal.descriptionPlaceholder: Reviews code for bugs and style
modal.toolsDesc: Comma-separated list of allowed tools (empty = all)
modal.disallowedToolsDesc: Comma-separated list of tools to disallow
modal.promptPlaceholder: You are a code reviewer. Analyze the given code for...

loadUserSettings.name: Load user Codex settings
loadUserSettings.desc: Codex reads its own CLI configuration. Codexidian keeps provider settings under this vault.

codexSafeMode.name: Safe mode
codexSafeMode.desc: Sandbox mode used when the Safe toggle is active.

customVariables.name: Custom variables
customVariables.desc: Environment variables for the active provider (KEY=VALUE format, one per line). Shell export prefix supported.

envSnippets.name: Snippets
envSnippets.noSnippets: No saved environment snippets yet. Click + to save your current environment configuration.
envSnippets.nameRequired: Please enter a name for the snippet

modal.name: Name
modal.namePlaceholder: A descriptive name for this environment configuration
modal.envVarsPlaceholder: KEY=VALUE format, one per line (export prefix supported)

customContextLimits.name: Custom Context Limits
customContextLimits.desc: Set context window sizes for your custom models. Leave empty to use the default (200k tokens).
customContextLimits.invalid: Invalid format. Use: 256k, 1m, or exact count (1000-10000000).

customModels.name: Custom models
customModels.desc: Append additional Codex model IDs to the picker, one per line. Environment model overrides still replace the picker.

enableChrome.name: Browser integration
enableChrome.desc: Browser integration is provider-specific. Codexidian does not manage a separate Chrome extension here.

enableBangBash.name: Enable bash mode (!)
enableBangBash.desc: Type ! on empty input to enter bash mode. Runs commands directly via Node.js child_process. Requires view reopen.

validation.noNode: Node.js not found on PATH. Install Node.js or check your PATH configuration.

maxTabs.name: Maximum chat tabs
maxTabs.desc: Maximum number of chat tabs open simultaneously (3-10). Each tab uses a separate Codex session.
maxTabs.warning: More than 5 tabs may impact performance and memory usage.

tabBarPosition.name: Tab bar position
tabBarPosition.desc: Choose where to display tab badges and action buttons

enableAutoScroll.name: Auto-scroll during streaming
enableAutoScroll.desc: Automatically scroll down while Codex streams responses. Disable to stay at the top and read from the beginning.

deferMathRenderingDuringStreaming.name: Defer math rendering during streaming
deferMathRenderingDuringStreaming.desc: Show raw LaTeX while responses stream, then render math once when each text block completes.

chatViewPlacement.name: Open Codexidian in
chatViewPlacement.desc: Choose where the chat panel opens when it is created

cliPath.name: Codex CLI path
cliPath.desc: Custom path to Codex CLI. Leave empty for auto-detection.
cliPath.descWindows: For native Windows, use codex.exe. For WSL, use a Linux command or Linux absolute path inside the selected distro.
cliPath.descUnix: Paste the output of "which codex", or leave empty for PATH lookup.

validation.isDirectory: Path is a directory, not a file

language.name: Language
language.desc: Change the display language of the plugin interface

initialize.name: Initialize knowledge-base workflow
initialize.desc: Create missing new/raw/wiki/outputs folders, AGENTS.md, indexes, workflow map, and Codex skills without overwriting existing files.

batchSize.name: Maximum sources per batch
batchSize.desc: Maximum number of files from new/ to process when compiling new sources.

summaryTemplate.name: Summary template
summaryTemplate.desc: Default structure for wiki/summaries/S-xxx files created from new/ sources.

conceptTemplate.name: Concept template
conceptTemplate.desc: Default structure for new wiki/concepts/C-xxx files.

archiveRules.name: Archive classification rules
archiveRules.desc: Controls how compiled new/ sources are renamed and archived into raw/.

archiveLogTemplate.name: Archive log template
archiveLogTemplate.desc: Log structure used when recording new/ to raw/ archive moves.

knowledgeWorkflow.notReady: Codexidian is not ready yet. Open the chat panel and try again.

initialized.ready: Codexidian knowledge-base workflow is ready. No new files were needed.
initialized.created: Codexidian knowledge-base workflow initialized: created {folders} folder(s) and {files} file(s).
initialized.failed: Failed to initialize Codexidian knowledge-base workflow: {message}

compileNewSources.name: Compile new sources
compileNewSources.description: Compile new sources from the vault root new/ folder

saveCurrentQa.name: Save current Q&A
saveCurrentQa.description: Save reusable conclusions from the current conversation to outputs/qa

applyHealthFixes.name: Apply health-check suggestions
applyHealthFixes.description: Apply low-risk fixes from the latest health-check report

undoLastArchive.name: Undo last archive
undoLastArchive.description: Build and run an undo plan from the latest archive log

workflowAcceptance.name: Run knowledge-base workflow acceptance check
workflowAcceptance.description: Run an end-to-end acceptance check for the current vault knowledge workflow
workflowAcceptance.notice: Sent: run knowledge-base workflow acceptance check
